name: Ryburn v. Huff
question: Did the police officers violate the Fourth Amendment by entering a home without a warrant when the homeowner exhibited unusual behavior leading the officers to believe they were in danger?
description: A case in which the Court held that police officers did not violate a homeowner's Fourth Amendment rights when they entered the home without a warrant after observing the homeowner exhibiting unusual behavior that led to their belief the homeowner was in danger.
